what_was_implemented.description: Standard-library-only, read-only scanner of committed plan -> result -> decision-memo artifacts under reports/, producing a normalized deterministic registry.
public_surface: build_registry(base) -> dict (pure read; no write, no subprocess, no network)
resolution_logic: scan glob crypto_d1_*plan*/report.json (same tree as the shipped JARVIS Lane Monitor)
result dir = plan dir name minus a TRAILING _plan; if no trailing _plan, do not apply the convention (stays PLAN_ONLY + warning) to avoid misreading the plan's own report.json as a result
verdict ceiling: ACTIVE/STRONG/PASS -> WATCH (+warning, unsafe flag); empty/unknown -> UNKNOWN, never PASS
timestamps derived only from artifacts (plan_date, result generated_at); no wall-clock dependence; repeated builds byte-identical

builds_on_plan.mapping: Implements roadmap Step 1 (Registry scanner) as the read-only single-source-of-truth built by scanning existing committed reports first. Field list, WATCH verdict ceiling, and the eight pinned-false safety flags match plan sections 6 and 8. No later-step components implemented.

routine_layer_reuse.reused_conventions: stdlib-only, deterministic, repo-root-relative style of tools/strategy_factory_routines.py; plan->result->memo scan + verdict-clamp pattern from the shipped JARVIS Crypto-D1 Lane Monitor (app.py).
routine_layer_reuse.not_reused: strategy_factory_routines.py reads a DIFFERENT input tree (trading_research/agentic_factory/reports/) and emits summaries (daily-state/queue/weekly-review), not a per-strategy registry keyed on reports/crypto_d1_* artifacts with the Step-1 schema. Extending it would overload a tool tuned to another tree/shape.
routine_layer_reuse.duplication_avoided: New scanner is minimal and single-purpose; it mirrors the existing safety posture rather than forking a parallel system.

covered_cases: scans plan + executed report -> EXECUTED, verdict WATCH, run_id present
decision memo advances stage to DECISION_RECORDED
ACTIVE/STRONG/PASS clamped to WATCH and flagged unsafe (+warning)
missing result, corrupt result JSON, and missing reports/ all fail closed
deterministic ordering + byte-identical JSON across builds
no subprocess, no stray writes; opt-in writer confined to the build folder

safety_confirmations.lane_unchanged: Crypto-D1 remains WATCH / MIXED and NOT_READY_FOR_REAL_DATA

warnings: crypto_d1_baseline_backtest_plan_v1: plan dir does not end with '_plan'; result-dir convention not applied (treated as plan-only)

next_step.name: Research Queue v1 schema + loader
next_step.deliverable: configs/research_queue.json + stdlib loader/validator + tests/test_strategy_factory_queue.py; schema + validation only, fail-closed, NO orchestration or execution; separately approved before build.

non_authorization_statement: This build adds a read-only scanner and its tests only. It authorizes no paper or live trading, no broker/exchange/order/fetch path, no ACTIVE/STRONG promotion, and no Bundle 23. It runs no backtest and mutates no dataset. Crypto-D1 remains WATCH / MIXED and NOT_READY_FOR_REAL_DATA.
